Problem: ENTRY_PREFIX_ONLY(0x12) and ENTRY_NOP_XCHG_AX(0x13) dispatch addresses were swapped. ENTRY_RESET(0xFF) pointed to ENTRY_NULL address instead of 0x040.
Recommended Fix: Regenerate dispatch.hex with correct address mapping: NULL→010 PREFIX_ONLY→030 NOP_XCHG_AX→020 RESET→040

Problem: Package contained only 4 of 20+ entry IDs and 3 of 60+ service IDs. All commit masks stage selectors register names conditions and microsequencer states were absent. Would cause RTL compile failures.
Recommended Fix: Replace with complete package generated from Appendix A containing all sections.

Problem: Microsequencer state list omitted WAIT_SERVICE and FAULT_HOLD. Spec defines four mandatory states. WAIT_SERVICE required as soon as any SVCW is used.
Recommended Fix: Add all four states with documentation. Propagate to keystone86_pkg.sv.

Problem: Bootstrap stub did not document that full INT_ENTER delivery path is deferred to Rung 5. Limitation was implicit not explicit.
Recommended Fix: Add TODO(rung5) comment with full delivery sequence so future implementer knows what to fill in.

Problem: Listing and hex file used slightly inconsistent formats. Neither documented the placeholder encoding scheme clearly.
Recommended Fix: Standardize to 8-digit hex. Document placeholder encodings in BOOTSTRAP_ROM_LAYOUT.md.

Problem: Bootstrap status dashboard does not call out where WAIT_SERVICE first becomes required (Rung 5 via INT_ENTER). Rung docs are correct but this connection is implicit.
Recommended Fix: Add note to Rung 5 doc that this is the first rung requiring WAIT_SERVICE state.

Problem: Smoke output says 'passed' without clarifying it checks seed data not hardware decode behavior. Could mislead a future contributor.
Recommended Fix: Add clarifying comment to output message and script header.
